css: .hm-trip-print{font-size:11pt}.hm-hdr{border:1px solid #333;padding:12px;margin-bottom:14px}.hm-hdr h2{margin:0 0 8px 0}.hm-meta span{margin-inline-end:18px;display:inline-block}.hm-tbl{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;margin:12px 0}.hm-tbl th,.hm-tbl td{border:1px solid #333;padding:6px 8px;text-align:start;vertical-align:top}.hm-tbl th{background:#f5f5f5}
